HERE’S WHAT cemetery software FEATURES WE BRING TO THE TABLE.
Missing a feature that you would like?  Let us know and we’ll work with you...Our roadmap is your roadmap.

Personal WorksPACE

Quick links to recently viewed pages
Personalized daily alerts and warnings
Task and meeting reminders
Cemetery calendar view
A list of all activities - tasks, meetings, and work orders

Performance Dashboards

Revenue summaries with gardens, plots, and order drill-down
Garden summaries by plot types, burials, and arrangements
Plot unit and revenue summary by status

Inventory Mapping & Management

Interactive cemetery maps of gardens and plots
Excel-like views of all plots
Custom filters to personalize views
Manage plot properties such as location and pictures
Interment tracking
Save records and contracts by plot

Sales & deals tracking

Pipeline tracking dashboard by deal stage
Excel-like dashboard of all deals and prospects
Filters to personalize views
Track and manage all deal properties
Create and email quotes to prospects

customer Management

Dashboard of revenue and unit sales
Excel-like view of prospects and plot owners
Filters to personalize views
Manage and track customer details
Schedule customer meetings and tasks
Maintain customer notes and roles

order management

Time-phased dashboard of all invoices
Manage and view invoices by status - Sent, Late, Due, Partial
At-need sales and pre-need payment plans
Create invoice drafts for approval
Automatically email invoices for payment
Manage quotes, subscriptions, and financing
Attach contracts to invoices for online payment
Stripe and PayPal integration for credit card payments
Configure invoices and add your branding

Operations Management

Performance dashboard of all work orders and service requests
Calendar and excel-like list view of all work orders and services
View of customer maintenance requests
Schedule recurring maintenance tasks
Approval and tracking workflow for all work orders and tasks
Work order and services alerts
Brand and personalize work orders and emails

Record KEEPING

Save documents, like contracts and deeds, to plot records
Upload cemetery, garden, and plot pictures for your online store
Maintain customer profile photos and primary contacts

reporting

Cemetery performance dashboards
Management dashboards for sales, invoicing, and operations
Custom excel-like data reports
Export reports to excel
Configure report views and fields
Create custom filters and fields

eCommerce webpage

URL link to sell plots on your website
Personalize and brand your online store
Quicklink shopping filters
Add your URL to EverAfterly to sell plots
Online interactive maps for your customers to view

account management

Manage field properties and labels through out software
Configure invoice and work order forms
Add users, assign roles, and manage custom privileges
Import all your data via Excel files
Setup your cemetery and gardens
Personalize your login web link
Upload your logos to brand EverArk
Manage your subscription and billing
Set your daily/weekly alerts and warning messages
Select your system defaults and color palette

Celebration of life APP

Sell to your customers a best-in-class, celebration of life, digital legacy experience where they can create, manage, and share:
  • An online memorial
  • A funeral notice & obituary
  • A final resting place

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Pricing questions? We can help.
Do I need to enter a credit card to try out EVERARK?
No. EverArk offers a fully functional 30-day trial as an introduction. You may try EverArk for up to 30 days without entering a credit card. When it’s time to activate your account, we will notify you. If you qualify for the Free version, some features may be removed as your free trial ends.
How secure is my data in EVERARK?
All of our software and your data is hosted by Amazon Web Services, or AWS. They can afford to spend billions on making sure your data is secure and safe hence why we choose to use AWS as our trusted hosting provider. If you want more information, you can read more here at https://aws.amazon.com/security/.
​Do I need to buy onboarding services?
EverArk has been design to be an intuitive, easy-to-use software so new users can learn at their own pace. We understand, however, that learning a new system can be daunting so we do offer training and help with implementing for a reasonable price. Otherwise, you should be able to user our wizards to help guide you through the importing and setup process.
Can I stop my subscription at any time?
Yes. At any time, you can stop your subscription and close your EverArk account. We don’t issue any refunds so we suggest closing your account at the end of your billing cycle. And, just in case you have any remorse, we will maintain your account for up to 3 months after you’ve closed it so you can reactivate it and start again where you left off.
​What support is available to everark users?
All EverArk users (free trial and basic plan) have access to our help training videos and software help guides.  Our pro plan subscribers can contact our support team via email. Users of EverArk’s pro edition also have access to support via email and phone. This means EverArk customer support specialists are available to answer your questions.
Don’t see the answer you’re looking for? Click the button and email us with your question.
